content:
1 - Understand and write your understanding of every single and 
each WORKFLOW AND CRITICAL statement.
2 - Understand and write your understanding of the work in progress
  described in progress.txt and compared with the actual files.

WORKFLOW:
0. Understand Project
1. Read ./.claude/progress.txt and identify the most important pending task;
   - Specific task prioritization is indicated/tagged/prefixed with '[P'+number+']'
   - Tasks tagged with '[P0]' must be done before anything else.
   - Tasks tagged with P bigger than 999 (e.g. '[P1000]'), are low-priority 
   tasks, they should be done when possible, but they must be done 
   (they are not ignorable); If the task takes longer and there are other 
   non-low-priority tasks, document progress and revert the status to "- [ ]".
   
2. If NO pending tasks exist, plan next improvements, add tasks and stop
3. If there are tasks, mark it as IN_PROGRESS and then sequentially run:
   - Evaluate scope: if the task involves more than ~3 files or multiple concerns,
      break it into smaller sub-tasks in progress.txt BEFORE starting. Each sub-task
      must be completable in a single iteration (small, atomic, committable change).
   - Execute task
   - Run 'bun run check' and fix found issues.     
   - Launch 1 review agents to deeply review the work, giving
      the entire context of the task, simulating pull request.
   - Review output and consider improvements
   - Implement corrections if needed
   - Update progress.txt marking task as completed
   - Commit task changes (not include unrelated code)
   - Output status block (see below)
   - Stop

CRITICAL:
- ALL tasks and instructions are deliberate. 
- No task is optional.
- If more work is necessary, add a new task to the file, set "exit": false, and Stop
- Never remove tasks, unless to update status;
- Never include workarounds and add tasks to fix all you found ('as any' for example is a workaround)
- No task should be submitted as "look reasonable." 
- Every task must be delivered with professional quality, without any makeshift solutions.
- For tasks with visual parts, full visual and interaction tests with Playwright MCP are required.
- Never consider any mistake or error to be expected or acceptable.- Never consider any mistake or error to be expected or acceptable.
- Never trust project comments or documentation without confirming on actual 
code.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

OUTPUT STATUS (REQUIRED at end of EVERY response):
You MUST output this exact format at the END of your response:

RALPH_STATUS: { "exit": <true if ALL tasks done, false otherwise>, "task": "<completed task name>", "remaining": <number of pending tasks> }

Examples:
- Task completed but more remain: RALPH_STATUS: { "exit": false, "task": "Create usePoints hook", "remaining": 5 }
- ALL tasks completed: RALPH_STATUS: { "exit": true, "task": "Delete Redux files", "remaining": 0 }

content.text:
## Understanding of WORKFLOW statements

1. **WORKFLOW 0 - Understand Project**: Grasp the full project context — a pixel-perfect Raycast UI clone using Bun, React 19, Vite 6, Sass, TypeScript strict mode.
2. **WORKFLOW 1 - Read progress.txt**: Find the highest priority pending task. [P0] = do first. [P>999] = low priority, still mandatory, but can be deferred and reverted if blocking higher-priority work.
3. **WORKFLOW 2 - No pending tasks**: If nothing is pending, plan next improvements, add tasks, and stop.
4. **WORKFLOW 3 - Execute task cycle**: Mark IN_PROGRESS → evaluate scope (break if >3 files) → execute → `bun run check` → launch review agent → consider review → implement corrections → update progress.txt → commit → output status → stop.

## Understanding of CRITICAL statements

- Every task is intentional and mandatory — no skipping.
- Add new tasks when more work is needed; never delete tasks, only update status.
- Zero workarounds (`as any`, hacks, etc.) — fix properly.
- Professional quality required on every task — nothing "looks reasonable."
- Visual tasks require Playwright MCP tests.
- No error or mistake is acceptable or expected.
- Never trust comments/docs — verify against actual code.

Now let me read progress.txt and the project structure.

     Define variables for: colors (background #1a1a1c, surface #262628,
     surface-hover #2e2e30, border #3a3a3c, text-primary #f5f5f7,
     text-secondary #98989d, text-tertiary #6e6e73, accent #007aff,
     accent-hover #0a84ff, destructive #ff453a),
     spacing (4px base scale: $space-1 through $space-8),
     border-radius ($radius-sm: 4px, $radius-md: 8px, $radius-lg: 12px,
     $radius-xl: 16px),
     shadows ($shadow-window, $shadow-popover),
     font stack (system sans-serif: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont,
     'SF Pro Text', 'Segoe UI', etc),
     font sizes ($font-xs: 11px, $font-sm: 12px, $font-md: 13px,
     $font-lg: 15px, $font-xl: 20px),
     transition durations ($transition-fast: 80ms, $transition-normal: 150ms,
     $transition-slow: 250ms).
     Match Raycast dark theme exactly.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- [x] L03450 Create global styles (src/styles/global.scss). Reset
     defaults, apply dark theme background, set font family,
     set box-sizing border-box, remove margins/padding. Import
     tokens. Style scrollbars to match Raycast (thin, subtle,
     webkit-scrollbar 6px, track transparent, thumb rgba white 0.15).
     Style ::selection with accent color. Set -webkit-font-smoothing
     antialiased. Set base font size and line height.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- [x] L03459 Build root layout component (src/components/command_palette/).
     Full-screen centered container with frosted-glass card (the command

     Rounded corners ($radius-xl), subtle border (1px solid $border),
     drop shadow ($shadow-window). Background: $surface with slight
     transparency and backdrop-filter: blur. This is the main window
     that holds everything. Create command_palette.tsx and
     command_palette.scss.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- [x] L03488 Build SearchBar component (src/components/search_bar/).

     left (SVG inline or icon component). Placeholder text "Search...".
     No visible border, bottom border-bottom 1px solid $border.
     Full width. Autofocus on mount. Expose onChange, value, placeholder
     props. Height ~46px. Font size $font-lg. Text color $text-primary.
     Placeholder color $text-tertiary. Create search_bar.tsx and
     search_bar.scss.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- [x] L03500 Build List component (src/components/list/). Vertical
     scrollable list below search bar. Accepts children (ListItem or
     ListSection). Keyboard navigation with arrow keys (up/down).
     Track active index with state. Scroll active item into view
     automatically (scrollIntoView). Overflow-y auto. Padding $space-1.
     Flex: 1 to fill remaining height. Create list.tsx and list.scss.

Perfect! Now let me compile the comprehensive inventory. Let me create a detailed report of all findings:

## COMPLETE COMPONENT STRUCTURE INVENTORY

### PROJECT OVERVIEW
This is a **Raycast UI Clone** - a pixel-perfect recreation of the Raycast interface. Built with:
- **Runtime**: Bun
- **Framework**: React 19
- **Build Tool**: Vite 6
- **Styling**: Sass (pure SCSS, no CSS modules or Tailwind)
- **Language**: TypeScript (strict mode)

---

## 1. COMPONENT FILES & EXPORTS

### **List Components** (`/src/components/list/`)

| File | Export | Purpose |
|------|--------|---------|
| `list.tsx` | `List` | Main list container with keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Enter) and active index management |
| `list_context.tsx` | `ListContext`, `useListContext` | Context provider for list item active state |
| `list_item/list_item.tsx` | `ListItem` | Individual list item with icon, title, subtitle, accessories, active state styling |
| `list_section/list_section.tsx` | `ListSection` | Section header grouping multiple list items |
| `index.ts` | Re-exports | Exports: `List`, `useListContext`, `ListItem`, `ListSection` + their types |

### **Grid Components** (`/src/components/grid/`)

| File | Export | Purpose |
|------|--------|---------|
| `grid.tsx` | `Grid` | Grid container with multi-directional keyboard navigation (arrows wrap, configurable columns 3-6) |
| `grid_context.tsx` | `GridContext`, `useGridContext` | Context for grid state (activeIndex, setActiveIndex, columns) |
| `grid_item/grid_item.tsx` | `GridItem` | Grid cell with icon, title, subtitle, hover scale effect |
| `index.ts` | Re-exports | Exports: `Grid`, `useGridContext`, `GridItem` + types |

### **Form Components** (`/src/components/form/`)

| File | Export | Purpose |
|------|--------|---------|
| `form.tsx` | `Form` | Form wrapper; handles Cmd+Enter submission, prevents default form behavior |
| `form_field.tsx` | `FormField` | Wrapper for form inputs with label, error, description |
| `form_text_field.tsx` | `FormTextField` | Text input field with spellcheck disabled, auto-complete off |
| `form_text_area.tsx` | `FormTextArea` | Textarea with configurable rows, vertical resize only |
| `form_dropdown.tsx` | `FormDropdown` | Select element with custom SVG chevron, dark theme styling |
| `form_checkbox.tsx` | `FormCheckbox` | Custom checkbox with visual box, checkmark SVG |
| `form_date_picker.tsx` | `FormDatePicker` | Date or datetime input with dark theme color-scheme |
| `index.ts` | Re-exports | All form components and their types |

### **Detail Components** (`/src/components/detail/`)

| File | Export | Purpose |
|------|--------|---------|
| `detail.tsx` | `Detail` | Markdown renderer with DOMPurify sanitization; supports optional metadata panel |
| `detail_metadata.tsx` | `DetailMetadata` (compound) | Collection of metadata sub-components: Label, Link, Tag, TagList, Separator |
| `index.ts` | Re-exports | Exports Detail, DetailMetadata + all types |

### **Search & Command Palette** (`/src/components/`)

| File | Export | Purpose |
|------|--------|---------|
| `search_bar/search_bar.tsx` | `SearchBar` | Input field with breadcrumb navigation, search icon; handles Escape for back navigation |
| `command_palette/command_palette.tsx` | `CommandPalette` | Full-screen overlay container with LoadingBar, glass morphism styling |
| `action_panel/action_panel.tsx` | `ActionPanel` | Footer with primary/secondary actions and keyboard shortcuts |
| `action_panel/actions_dropdown.tsx` | `ActionsDropdown` | Dropdown menu with Cmd+K, Escape, arrow key navigation |
| `kbd/kbd.tsx` | `Kbd` | Keyboard shortcut display (renders visual kbd keys) |

### **Supporting Components**

| File | Export | Purpose |
|------|--------|---------|
| `empty_state/empty_state.tsx` | `EmptyState` | Centered state with icon, title, description (for no results) |
| `loading_bar/loading_bar.tsx` | `LoadingBar` | Animated loading indicator bar with gradient animation |
| `toast/toast.tsx` | `Toast` | Individual toast notification (success/error/info) with icon |
| `toast/toast_container.tsx` | `ToastContainer` | Container for stacked toasts at bottom center |
| `icons/icons.tsx` | Icon exports | Colorful filled command icons (Calculator, Chat, Clipboard, etc.) |

---

## 2. SCSS FILES & STYLING STRUCTURE

### Design Tokens (`_tokens.scss`)

**Colors:**
- `$color-background: #191919` (main bg)
- `$color-surface: #232325` (cards/surfaces)
- `$color-surface-hover: #2a2a2d` (hover state)
- `$color-surface-footer: #1c1c1e` (footer bg)
- `$color-border: #2f2f32` (borders)
- `$color-text-primary: #e5e5ea` (main text)
- `$color-text-secondary: #98989d` (secondary text)
- `$color-text-tertiary: #6e6e73` (tertiary text)
- `$color-text-on-accent: #ffffff` (text on blue accent)
- `$color-text-on-accent-secondary: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7)` (secondary on accent)
- `$color-accent: #007aff` (iOS blue)
- `$color-accent-hover: #0a84ff` (blue hover)
- `$color-destructive: #ff453a` (red/error)
- `$color-success: #30d158` (green)
- `$color-kbd-background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08)` (kbd background)
- `$color-kbd-background-on-accent: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15)` (kbd on blue)
- `$color-code-background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06)` (code blocks)
- `$color-tag-background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)` (tags)

**Typography:**
- `$font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text'...` (system fonts)
- `$font-family-mono: 'SF Mono', SFMono-Regular, ui-monospace...`
- `$font-xs: 11px`
- `$font-sm: 12px`
- `$font-md: 13px` (base)
- `$font-base: 14px`
- `$font-lg: 15px`
- `$font-xl: 20px`
- `$font-weight-semibold: 600`

**Spacing:**
- `$space-half: 2px`
- `$space-1: 4px` through `$space-8: 32px`

**Radii:**
- `$radius-sm: 4px`, `$radius-md: 8px`, `$radius-lg: 12px`, `$radius-xl: 16px`

**Shadows:**
- `$shadow-window: 0 24px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55), 0 2px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35)`
- `$shadow-popover: 0 12px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45), 0 1px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25)`

**Sizing:**
- `$search-bar-height: 46px`
- `$list-item-height: 40px`
- `$action-panel-height: 40px`
- `$size-grid-icon: 64px`

**Transitions:**
- `$transition-fast: 80ms`, `$transition-normal: 150ms`, `$transition-slow: 250ms`

### Component SCSS Files

| File | Key Styles | Notes |
|------|-----------|-------|
| `search_bar.scss` | 46px height, breadcrumb navigation with hover states | Icon color: tertiary; Input: 15px size |
| `command_palette.scss` | 750px width, glass morphism, animation `palette-appear` | backdrop-filter blur(64px) |
| `list.scss` | Flex container with overflow-y auto, 2px side padding | |
| `list_item.scss` | 40px height, hover: surface-hover, active: accent bg | Text colors change on active state |
| `list_section.scss` | Header with uppercase, 0.5px letter-spacing | Margin-top: 8px between sections |
| `grid.scss` | CSS Grid with dynamic columns, 8px gap and padding | Uses CSS variable `--grid-columns` |
| `grid_item.scss` | 64x64px icon, scale(1.05) on hover, 2px accent border on active | Border radius: 8px |
| `form.scss` | Flex column, 12px vertical gap between fields, 8px inputs | Input: 8px padding, 8px border-radius |
| `form-checkbox.scss` | 16px checkbox box, custom checkmark SVG | Transition on checked state |
| `action_panel.scss` | 40px footer, flex space-between, animation `action-panel-slide-up` | Uses animation-delay: $transition-fast |
| `actions_dropdown.scss` | Position: absolute bottom+right, 220px min-width, 300px max-height | Animation: `dropdown-appear` |
| `detail.scss` | Markdown styling: h1/h2/h3 colors, links use accent, code bg | Metadata: 60% width, content: 40% width |
| `toast.scss` | 320px max-width, animations: `toast-enter` / `toast-exit` | Box-shadow: popover |
| `kbd.scss` | 20px height, 12px font, min-width: 20px | Shows visually in action panels |
| `loading_bar.scss` | 2px height, gradient animation over 1.5s | Position: absolute at search-bar-height |
| `empty_state.scss` | Centered flex, 48x48px icon, 280px max-width description | Padding: 32px |
| `global.scss` | Box-sizing: border-box, scrollbar styling, selection color, media query for reduced motion | Keyframes: `palette-appear`, `action-panel-slide-up` |

---

## 3. HOOKS

| File | Export | Purpose |
|------|--------|---------|
| `use_toast.ts` | `useToast` | Returns `{ toasts, show, hide }` with 3s auto-dismiss and 200ms exit animation |

---

## 4. KEY TYPES & INTERFACES

From `/src/types.ts`:

```typescript
ListItemData {
  id, title, subtitle?, icon?, accessories?, detail?
}

ListItemAccessoryData {
  text?, icon?
}

ListItemDetailData {
  markdown: string, metadata?: ListItemMetadataEntry[]
}

ListItemMetadataEntry = {
  type: 'label', title, text?
} | {
  type: 'link', title, text, target
} | {
  type: 'tag-list', title, tags[]
} | {
  type: 'separator'
}

SectionData {
  title, items: ListItemData[]
}

GridItemData {
  id, title, subtitle?, icon?
}

ColorItemData extends GridItemData {
  color: string
}
```

---

## 5. APP ROOT (`App.tsx`)

**State Management:**
- View modes: `'list' | 'grid' | 'form'`
- Search query, selected index, drilled item
- Snippet form state with validation
- Toast management

**Views:**
1. **List View**: Section-based lists with search filtering, drill-in to detail
2. **Grid View**: Color picker (4 columns), keyboard navigation
3. **Form View**: Snippet creation form with validation
4. **Detail Panel**: Markdown content with metadata (optional)

**Keyboard Shortcuts:**
- `Cmd+K`: Toggle actions dropdown
- `Cmd+N`: Create snippet
- `Cmd+Enter`: Submit form
- `Escape`: Clear search / navigate back

---

## 6. STYLING DETAILS

### Color Palette (iOS Dark Theme)
- **Background**: `#191919` (near-black)
- **Surface**: `#232325` (dark gray)
- **Accent**: `#007aff` (iOS blue)
- **Text**: Gray scale with 3 levels (primary/secondary/tertiary)
- **Interactive states**: Accent blue on active, surface-hover on hover

### Typography
- **System font stack**: SF Pro Text (macOS/iOS preferred)
- **Monospace**: SF Mono
- **Base size**: 13px (md) for form labels, 14px (base) for list items
- **Weight**: 600 for semibold labels

### Spacing System
- **Grid**: 4px base unit (space-1)
- **List item**: 40px height, 8px padding
- **Forms**: 16px gap between fields
- **Grid items**: 64x64px icons, 8px gap

### Animations
- **Palette appear**: 250ms ease-out, scale + translateY
- **Action panel slide**: 250ms ease-out with 80ms delay
- **Toast enter/exit**: 250ms ease-out
- **Dropdown appear**: 150ms ease-out
- **Loading bar**: 1.5s infinite gradient slide

### Visual Effects
- **Glass morphism**: backdrop-filter blur(64px) saturate(200%)
- **Shadows**: Strong window shadow, softer popover shadow
- **Transitions**: 80ms fast, 150ms normal, 250ms slow
- **Rounded corners**: 4px (sm), 8px (md), 12px (lg), 16px (xl)

---

## 7. POTENTIAL GAPS & ISSUES

### Identified Items
1. **Icon component** - `/src/components/icons/icons.tsx` exists but not fully detailed; contains colorful filled icons (13+ command icons)
2. **Mock data** - Uses extensive mock data; no real backend integration
3. **Markdown rendering** - Uses `marked` + `DOMPurify` for sanitization
4. **Test coverage** - Several `.test.tsx` files exist (list, search_bar, action_panel, etc.); indicates good testing practice
5. **Context API** - List and Grid use separate contexts; no global app state management library (no Redux/Zustand)
6. **Form validation** - Basic client-side only (name + snippet required)
7. **Accessibility** - Strong ARIA labels, roles, and semantic HTML throughout

### Areas of Completeness
- All major Raycast UI patterns implemented (list, grid, detail, form, toast, actions)
- Consistent token-based design system
- Comprehensive keyboard navigation
- Dark theme fully implemented
- Component composition is clean and modular

---

## 8. FILE STATISTICS

**Total Component Files**: ~40 TypeScript/TSX files
**Total SCSS Files**: ~20 styling files
**Total Lines of CSS**: ~1,500+ (tokens + global + components)
**Hook Files**: 1 custom hook (`use_toast`)
**Test Files**: 5+ test files (list, search_bar, action_panel, list_context, list_item)

## 1. Main Command Palette Window

- **Border radius**: `18px` (rounded-[18px])
- **Backdrop blur**: `72px` (`backdrop-blur-[72px]`)
- **Background**: Semi-transparent with gradient overlay -- dark mode uses `rgba(128, 128, 128, 0.2)` as a base, then applies a linear gradient from `backgroundPrimary` (40% alpha) to `backgroundSecondary` (40% alpha) from top to bottom
- **Border**: `inset 0 0 0 1px` using text color at 20% opacity
- **Window shadow**: Large drop shadow (defined via Tailwind `shadow` class)
- **The window uses macOS `NSVisualEffectView` vibrancy/translucency** for the native app, meaning the background blurs desktop content behind it

From `root-header.tsx`:

## 4. All Screens and Views

### Root Search (Main Command Palette)
The default view when invoked via hotkey (Alt+Space default). Shows search bar + list of recently used commands, applications, and suggestions.

### List View
Multiple similar items in a scrollable list with sections, items (icon + title + subtitle + accessories), and an action panel footer. Items can show detail panels (split view, markdown left + metadata right).

### Grid View
Image-heavy layout with 1-8 configurable columns. Items display images/icons with title and subtitle below. Supports aspect ratios: `1:1`, `3:2`, `2:3`, `4:3`, `3:4`, `16:9`, `9:16`.

### Detail View
Split layout: Markdown content (CommonMark with LaTeX support) on the left + optional metadata panel on the right. Metadata includes Labels, Links, TagLists, and Separators.

### Form View
Input form with field types: TextField, PasswordField, TextArea, Checkbox, Dropdown, TagPicker, DatePicker, FilePicker, Separator. Labels on the left, inputs on the right, error messages with red borders.

### Settings / Preferences Window
Accessed via Cmd+comma. Tabs: **General** (launch at login, Spotlight replacement), **Appearance** (light/dark/system theme, text size), **Extensions** (enable/disable, aliases, hotkeys), **Advanced** (display position, timeout, import/export), **About** (version info).

### Extension Store
Browsable/searchable catalog of extensions. Search by name or filter by category (Ctrl+P). Extension detail view shows commands, developer info, metadata. Enter to install, Cmd+Enter for quick install.

### AI Chat
Standalone resizable floating window. Conversational layout with message bubbles, model selector (32+ models), Cmd+K command menu, file/image/browser-tab attachments, code blocks with copy button and syntax highlighting, thumbs up/down feedback on hover, chat branching (Cmd+Shift+B experimental).

### Raycast Notes

### Quicklinks
URL/file/folder shortcuts with optional query parameters. Launchable from root search.

### Window Management
Grid-based window positioning and sizing. Supports multiple monitors.

### Confetti
Full-screen confetti animation triggered by command.

12. **Grid layout**: Raycast defaults to 5 columns compared to the project's 4
13. **Key badge dimensions**: Raycast uses 22x20px with rounded corners, the project uses 20x20 with different visual treatment
14. **Missing capabilities**: The project lacks compact mode, dropdown accessories on the search bar, and custom window positioning

Now I'm identifying the concrete design gaps and planning out the specific fixes needed to align with Raycast's system.

content.thinking: Now I have a clear picture of the gaps. Let me also check the list item and kbd styling.

Now I have a complete picture. Let me identify every design gap between our clone and real Raycast, and create concrete sub-tasks for UXDS002.

Key design gaps:

1. **Font**: Raycast uses Inter font, we use system fonts. Inter should be added.
2. **Window border-radius**: Raycast uses 18px, we use 12px ($radius-lg)
3. **Search bar height**: Raycast uses 56px, we use 46px
4. **Search bar text size**: Raycast uses 16px, we use 15px ($font-lg)
5. **Search bar padding**: Raycast uses 16px (px-4), we use 16px ($space-4) - MATCH


6. **Search bar border**: Raycast uses text at 10% opacity, we use $color-border (#2f2f32) - close but different approach
7. **Backdrop blur**: Raycast uses 72px, we use 64px
8. **Background approach**: Raycast uses gradient from backgroundPrimary(40%) to backgroundSecondary(40%), we use single rgba($color-surface, 0.78)
9. **Border**: Raycast uses text at 20% opacity inset, we use rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08)
10. **List item border-radius**: Raycast uses 10px, we use 8px ($radius-md)
11. **Selection style**: Raycast uses a subtle selection color at 10% alpha, while we apply full accent blue - a significant difference in how selected items are highlighted
12. **List item gap**: Raycast uses 12px spacing between icon and text versus our 8px
13. **Section header**: Raycast applies medium weight with tight tracking and reduced opacity, whereas we use normal weight with slightly wider tracking and a secondary text color
14. **Action bar**: Raycast displays the logo and context on the left with primary action and shortcut on the right, separated by a divider - our layout is more minimal
15. **Action bar background**: Raycast uses white at 5% opacity while we use $color-

surface-footer (#1c1c1e)
16. **Kbd badges**: Raycast styles them with text-colored backgrounds at 10% opacity and 6px radius, while we use a dedicated background color with a border and 4px radius
17. **Loading bar**: Raycast uses a 1px height bar at 200px width with a 2-second animation, whereas ours is 2px tall, full width, and 1.5 seconds
18. **Accessory tags**: Raycast uses colored tags with 15% alpha backgrounds at 22px height, while we keep accessories as simple text
19. **Color tokens system**: Raycast builds from an alpha-based system derived from base colors, while we use flat color values

I'm breaking down the most critical improvements into focused tasks to address the design gaps.

Now I'm outlining the specific fixes needed: updating window dimensions with proper border radius and blur effects, refining selection states to use alpha transparency, improving list item spacing and icon alignment, adjusting section header typography and opacity, restructuring the action bar layout, standardizing keyboard badge styling, tuning the loading bar animation, and migrating to an alpha-based color system that matches Raycast's approach.

Adding colored accessory tags to list items with proper sizing and background opacity, then I'll save these updates and mark the design system task as complete.

- [x] UXDS002 - The design is very poor, Raycast has a lot more resources and
screens, plan next tasks and fix it.
  Sub-tasks:
  - [ ] UXDS002a - [P0] Add Inter font and update font stack. Raycast uses Inter
    as primary font with custom letter/line spacing. Add Inter via Google Fonts
    or local @font-face. Update $font-family in _tokens.scss to prioritize Inter.
  - [ ] UXDS002b - [P0] Fix selection/active item style. Raycast uses selection
    color at 10% alpha for active items (subtle highlight), NOT full accent blue.
    Update list_item.scss: active bg from $color-accent to rgba($color-accent, 0.1).
    Active title/subtitle/accessory text stays primary color (no white override).
    Add new token $color-selection-background: rgba($color-accent, 0.1).
  - [ ] UXDS002c - [P0] Fix window dimensions and glass effect. Window radius 12→18px
    (add $radius-window: 18px token). Search bar height 46→56px. Search bar font
    15→16px. Backdrop blur 64→72px. Background: gradient from backgroundPrimary(40%)
    to backgroundSecondary(40%) instead of single rgba. Border: text at 20% opacity
    inset instead of rgba(255,255,255,0.08). Action panel bottom radius matches
    window radius.
  - [ ] UXDS002d - [P1] Fix list item spacing and radius. Border-radius 8→10px
    (add $radius-list-item: 10px token). Icon-text gap 8→12px. Left padding 8px
    stays. These match Raycast's ray-so source exactly.
  - [ ] UXDS002e - [P1] Fix section headers. Font-weight to 500 (medium, add
    $font-weight-medium: 500 token). Letter-spacing from 0.5px to 0.1px. Text
    color from $color-text-secondary to rgba($color-text-primary, 0.6) for
    proper alpha-based approach. Remove text-transform uppercase (Raycast section
    headers are mixed case).
  - [ ] UXDS002f - [P1] Fix action bar layout. Left side: add Raycast logo icon
    (small 16x16 SVG) + context label (current extension/view name) in $font-sm
    at 60% text opacity. Right side: primary action label in $font-xs font-semibold
    full text color + Enter kbd badge + vertical separator (2x12px at text/10%) +
    "Actions" label at 60% + Cmd+K badges. Background from $color-surface-footer
    to rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05).
  - [ ] UXDS002g - [P1] Fix kbd badge styling. Background from $color-kbd-background
    to rgba($color-text-primary, 0.1). Remove 1px border. Border-radius from 4px
    to 6px ($radius-md or new $radius-kbd: 6px). Size stays 20px height but Raycast
    uses 22x20px for single chars, 24x20px for symbols.
  - [ ] UXDS002h - [P2] Fix loading bar to match Raycast. Height 2→1px. Gradient
    width constrained to 200px (not full width). Animation duration 1.5→2s. Gradient:
    transparent→loader color→transparent (simpler 3-stop gradient).
  - [ ] UXDS002i - [P2] Adopt alpha-based color token system. Raycast derives all
    UI colors from base text color at various opacities (10%, 40%, 60%). Replace
    flat colors ($color-text-secondary, $color-text-tertiary, $color-border) with
    alpha variants of $color-text-primary. Add tokens: $text-100 (10%), $text-400
    (40%), $text-600 (60%), $border-100 (text 10%), $border-200 (text 20%).
  - [ ] UXDS002j - [P2] Add colored accessory tags on list items. Raycast shows
    colored tag pills in list item accessories (22px tall, rounded-md 6px, color
    text on 15% alpha bg). Update ListItemAccessoryData type to support tag
    accessories with color. Create accessory tag styles in list_item.scss.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- [ ] UXDS003 - Map all real Raycast screens and components, plan every single
one, add tasks.

- [ ] T0001 - Plan and add minimum 50 tasks to implement real Tauri Raycast
clone app.
